content.text:
Based on the visualization of the molecule, I can identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 27 (C:27):

From the 3D structure shown, atom C:27 is covalently bonded to:
- C:30 (carbon) - connected to the left
- C:1 (carbon) - connected below and to the right  
- O:0 (oxygen) - connected above and to the right

These are the three atoms directly bonded to C:27.

Regarding the geomconf_index, based on the file naming convention in the working directory, the molecule appears to be from file "geomconf_9025.xyz", which suggests the geomconf_index is 9025.

So the neighbor atoms of atom 27 are:
- Atom index 30, element C
- Atom index 1, element C  
- Atom index 0, element O

Geomconf_index: 9025

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 27, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
